notes: Thin scaffold file (124 lines, all proofs 1-2 lines, no sorry) bridging formal-group linear coefficients to omega-pullback coefficients; the only non-trivial content lives in the imported OmegaPullbackCoeff.lean. The main theorem isogPullbackCoeff_add_of_formal is a pure-transitivity wrapper by design, with callers (BridgeMulByInt.lean, BridgeFrobenius.lean) responsible for verifying the bridge hypotheses. Three of five declarations are dead-code candidates within this file (only used externally).
